properties.body: kanal 16/17 (Kallesignal «Andøya Space»). Epost: mso@andoyaspace.no  Se www.andoyaspace.no for daglige varslinger og kart. Name: DANGER AREA ECHO Description: In the period May 10th - May14th, 2026 there will be activity off the coast of Andøya/Senja. Activities will take place during the period between 22:00-05:00 local time. The danger area "ECHO" is colored yellow prior to activation. 2-3 hours before the danger area is activated, it will be colored red. The danger area is disabled and returns to yellow as soon as the activity ends.   Should there be a need for transit or use of the area, this can be coordinated with Andøya Space.? During the above period, maritime traffic is asked to be aware of the notified areas or contact Andøya Space for coordination during the campaign period. Phone 94 07 59 44 / 76 14 45 87 and maritime VHF channel 16/17 (Call sign «Andøya Space»).  Email: mso@andoyaspace.no See www.andoyaspace.no for daily notifications and maps.

properties.body: i ovennevnte tidsrom om å være oppmerksom på de varslede områdene, og eventuelt kontakte Andøya Space for koordinering i kampanjeperioden. Kontaktinformasjon: Telefon: 94 07 59 44 / 76 14 45 87 Maritim VHF: Kanal 16/17 (kallesignal «Andøya Space») E-post: mso@andoyaspace.no Se www.andoyaspace.no for daglige varslinger og kart. Name: DANGER AREA SIERRA Description: During the period 10-14 May 2026, activities will take place off the coast of Andøya/Senja. Activities will generally occur between 22:00-05:00 local time throughout the period. Exception: During 12-13 May, activity in hazard area SIERRA will take place between 18:00-05:00 local time. On all other days, SIERRA will follow the standard timeframe of 22:00-05:00 local time. The hazard area will be marked in yellow prior to activation. Approximately 2-3 hours before activation, the area will change to red. Once the activity has concluded, the hazard area will be deactivated and revert to yellow. If transit through or use of the area is required, this may be coordinated with Andøya Space. Maritime traffic is requested to remain aware of the notified areas during the specified periods and, if necessary, contact Andøya Space for coordination during the campaign. Contact information: Phone: +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 45 87 Maritime VHF: Channel 16/17 (call sign "Andøya Space") Email: mso@andoyaspace.no  See www.andoyaspace.no for daily notifications and maps.

properties.body: Name: Danger Area Sea Inner Description: The danger area is active 19.03-29.03.2026 with launch window 21:00-22:00 local time. The danger area is indicated as yellow prior to activation. The danger area  is indicated red when it is less than 4-6 hours until it activates and the launch window opens. The danger area is deactivated and goes back to yellow as soon as the activity is finished. Should there be a need for transit or use of the area, this can be coordinated with Andøya Space. The operations center is staffed during the launch window 09:30-23:00 local time. Contact us on phone  73 60 70 64/ 94 07 59 44, or on maritime channel 16 / 14 with call sign "Andøya Space". Outside the launch window, inquiries can be sent to mso@andoyaspace.no, call phone 94 07 59 44

properties.body: Name: VG3 Student Rocket Description: The danger area is active on June 4th with launch window 1245-1600 local time. Backup day is June 5th with launch window 0845-1600 local time. The danger area is indicated as yellow prior to activation. The danger area is indicated red when it is less than 2-3 hours until it activates, and the launch window opens. The danger area is deactivated and goes back to yellow as soon as the activity is finished. Should there be a need for transit or use of the area, this can be coordinated with Andøya Space. Contact us on Phone 76 14 44 28, maritime channel 16 / 14 with call sign "Andøya Space". The operations center is staffed 1 hour before the launch window opens.  In advance of the launch, inquiries can be sent to mso@andoyaspace.no
